top3.sql:
SELECT p.ID, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) AS age
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.LDH BETWEEN 100 AND 300;

SELECT p.ID, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) AS age
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.LDH BETWEEN 100 AND 300;

SELECT p.ID, CAST((JULIANDAY('now') - JULIANDAY(p.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.LDH >= 100 AND l.LDH <= 300;

FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.LDH >= 100 AND l.LDH <= 300;
